  "findings": [
    "Severe, rapid metallic rattling/clacking noise synchronized with engine speed",
    "Likely loose timing chain due to failed tensioner or worn guides",
    "High risk of skipped timing and catastrophic engine damage"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down engine immediately and do not restart",
    "Remove valve cover and timing cover to inspect chain tension, guides, and tensioner",
    "Replace timing chain kit including tensioner, guides, and sprockets"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a highly pronounced, rapid metallic clattering/slapping noise characteristic of a severely loose timing chain striking the timing cover or worn-through guides. Operating the engine in this state presents a critical risk of the chain jumping teeth, leading to piston-to-valve contact and catastrophic engine failure.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Service Manual - Engine Mechanical (Timing Chain Assembly Diagnostics)"
  ]
}
